channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Taylen Green leads Arkansas to 39-26 victory over Texas Tech in the Liberty Bowl
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Taylen Green threw for 341 yards and two touchdowns and ran for 81 yards in Arkansas' 39-26 victory over Texas Tech on Friday night in the Liberty Bowl. Green completed 11 of 21 passes and Arkansas (7-6) had 573 yards of total offense.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets and pitcher Sean Manaea finalize $75 million, 3-year deal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Manaea and the New York Mets finalized a $75 million, three-year contract Friday night that keeps one of the team's best pitchers last season at the front of a remodeled rotation. The sides agreed to financial terms earlier this week, subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA coaches react with dismay over firing of 2-time coach of the year Mike Brown
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Not even two years ago, Rick Carlisle publicly lauded Mike Brown for the job he did on the way to winning the NBA's coach of the year award. And on Friday, Carlisle was among the coaches reacting with dismay that Brown was fired.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Navy gets 95-yard TD run from Horvath and stops 2-point try to beat Oklahoma in Armed Forces Bowl
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — Blake Horvath set a Navy record with a 95-yard touchdown run and then scored a go-ahead 6-yarder with 4:34 left as the Midshipmen overcame an early two-touchdown deficit and stopped a late 2-point conversion attempt to beat Oklahoma 21-20 in the Armed Forces Bowl on Friday.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, 27, killed in hunting accident
item.description: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, who served as a sergeant in the U.S. Army, was tragically killed in a hunting accident over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers' Mookie Betts shares message to Yankees fans who tried to pry ball out of his glove in World Series
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers right fielder Mookie Betts revealed his message for the the Yankees fans who tried to pry the ball out of his glove during Game 4 of the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Seahawks pick up ugly win over Bears to remain in NFC West title hunt
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks didn't look great on offense, but they still managed a crucial win over the Chicago Bears to stay in the NFC West title race on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Toledo, Pitt make bowl game history in extended contest that becomes instant classic
item.description: Toledo took down Pitt, 48-46, in Thursday's GameAbove Sports Bowl in Detroit that took six overtimes to complete, the most in bowl game history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Heat president Pat Riley shuts down Jimmy Butler trade rumors, addressing 'distraction' head on
item.description: Miami Heat president Pat Riley addressed rumors that the organization is willing to trade six-time All-Star Jimmy Butler, shutting them down as they've become a "distraction.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys beat Tampa Bay 26-24 as Baker Mayfield and the Bucs lose control of their playoff fate
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Baker Mayfield came home to Texas looking to keep his Tampa Bay Buccaneers on track for the playoffs. Instead, they'll need some help.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland legend, Hall of Famer Rickey Henderson has died at the age of 65
item.description: (KRON) – Rickey Henderson, one of the greatest baseball players to ever live, died at age 65. Henderson is Major League Baseball’s all-time stolen base leader and is considered by many to be the greatest player in A’s franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4
